name: agent-analyze-code-quality
tagline: Read-only static code review agent that scores code quality, lists code smells, and emits a structured markdown report.
verdict: Read-only tool scoping (Bash/Write/Edit forbidden) keeps this low-risk, and the output template and criteria are concrete. Weakness is packaging: the real frontmatter description is an auto-generated stub with no trigger phrasing or scope exclusions, and failure handling is only a generic 'continuing with partial analysis' hook.

highlights.summary: description is only 'Agent skill for analyze-code-quality - invoke with $agent-analyze-code-quality' — no situations or trigger phrasing.
No 'NOT for' / exclusion text anywhere in frontmatter or body.
on_error hook only says 'Continuing with partial analysis' — no real guidance for missing files, unsupported languages, or empty scan results.
